meaning: n.[化]重亚硫酸盐,酸性亚硫酸盐
examples: In the presence of water, the sodium metabisulfite produces sodium bisulfite.
Some samples of sodium bisulfite caused part of the diphenyl-acetic acid to dissolve.
The active cooking chemicals in the sulfite process are sulfur dioxide, sulfurous acid, and calcium bisulfite.
